text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include all codes defined in https://gematik.de/fhir/directory/CodeSystem/TIInstitutionTypeOidCS
  • Include all codes defined in https://gematik.de/fhir/directory/CodeSystem/TIProviderTypeCS
  • Include all codes defined in http://ihe-d.de/ValueSets/IHEXDSpracticeSettingCode

name: TIOrganizationTypeVS
title: Type of TIOrganization
description: ValueSet of all Organization types in the gematik FHIR Directory
